## Source: ossf-package-analysis (549f13f989fce7c29dae7c0e9f28fe0add0808204154896a48c7d5b093e0d6aa)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'monolith-twirp-git_src_migrator-migrations' @ 1.11.0 (rubygems) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
